Barista 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Organizing study repos using Barista

Organizing study repos using Barista

Ajit Londhe

2025-07-15

Source: vignettes/UsingBarista.Rmd
UsingBarista.Rmd

Introduction

This vignette describes how you can use the Barista package to

Installation instructions

The Barista package is currently maintained in a Github repository, and has dependencies on other packages in Github. All of these packages can be downloaded and installed from within R using the drat package:

install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("ohdsi/Barista")

Once installed, you can type library(Barista) to load the package.

Acknowledgments

Considerable work has been dedicated to provide the Barista package.

citation("Barista")
## To cite package 'Barista' in publications use:
## 
##   Londhe A, Lavallee M, Sadowski K (2025). _Barista: Barista_. R package version 0.0.1, https://github.com/OHDSI/Barista, <https://ohdsi.github.io/Barista/>.
## 
## A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is
## 
##   @Manual{,
##     title = {Barista: Barista},
##     author = {Ajit Londhe and Martin Lavallee and Katy Sadowski},
##     year = {2025},
##     note = {R package version 0.0.1, https://github.com/OHDSI/Barista},
##     url = {https://ohdsi.github.io/Barista/},
##   }

Further, Barista makes extensive use of the Ulysses package and CohortGenerator package.

citation("Ulysses")
## To cite package 'Ulysses' in publications use:
## 
##   Lavallee M (2024). _Ulysses: Automate OHDSI Study Setup_. R package version 0.0.7, commit 6f06202d03c40a8bf18ee1d550dff38150f139d9, <https://github.com/OHDSI/Ulysses>.
## 
## A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is
## 
##   @Manual{,
##     title = {Ulysses: Automate OHDSI Study Setup},
##     author = {Martin Lavallee},
##     year = {2024},
##     note = {R package version 0.0.7, commit 6f06202d03c40a8bf18ee1d550dff38150f139d9},
##     url = {https://github.com/OHDSI/Ulysses},
##   }
citation("CohortGenerator")
## To cite package 'CohortGenerator' in publications use:
## 
##   Sena A, Gilbert J, Rao G, Schuemie M (2025). _CohortGenerator: Cohort Generation for the OMOP Common Data Model_. R package version 0.12.0, commit
##   5a3375110b35fa833461a54eccbe09c75859dd86, <https://github.com/OHDSI/CohortGenerator>.
## 
## A BibTeX entry for LaTeX users is
## 
##   @Manual{,
##     title = {CohortGenerator: Cohort Generation for the OMOP Common Data Model},
##     author = {Anthony Sena and Jamie Gilbert and Gowtham Rao and Martijn Schuemie},
##     year = {2025},
##     note = {R package version 0.12.0, commit 5a3375110b35fa833461a54eccbe09c75859dd86},
##     url = {https://github.com/OHDSI/CohortGenerator},
##   }
